creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
Yup. This port actually installs the IBM JDK 1.3.0. It also registers the 
port with javavmwrapper. Pretty kewl. The version output after installing 
this JDK:

> javavm -version
JIT cannot get processor_num. Assuming SMP...
java version "1.3.0"
Java(TM) 2 Runtime Environment, Standard Edition (build 1.3.0)
Classic VM (build 1.3.0, J2RE 1.3.0 IBM build cx130-20010329 (JIT enabled: 
jitc))

Okay, basically it seems to run. I see no trouble in submitting this port 
after the given suggestions have been incorporated. We may have to improve 
matters afterwards, but at least we'll have an IBM JDK port B-)

Great work, Hye-Shik!

--
Ernst
